mapper.update: update cb_content set title = #{title}, category = #{category}, scope = #{scope}, county_code = #{countyCode}, office_code = #{officeCode}, office_name = #{officeName}, rich_text_html = #{richTextHtml}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from cb_content order by published_at desc limit #{limit}
